data.title: GROW THERAPY INTRODUCES AI COACH WITH CLINICIAN OVERSIGHT TO SUPPORT CLIENTS BETWEEN THERAPY SESSIONS
data.description: In New York, a significant trend has been noted as patients have surpassed sending over 800,000 messages to an AI coach for support. This shift towards utilizing generative AI tools for handling stress, anxiety, and various mental health issues reflects a growing reliance on technology for mental well-being. To cater to this increasing demand, Grow Therapy (Grow) has introduced a novel method to provide support while ensuring licensed professionals are involved in the process.

data.title: Northern Virginia Housing Market Defies National Trends with Strong Sales Growth in March
data.description: Despite a challenging national real estate market, the housing market in Northern Virginia remains robust according to data from March 2026. Sales activity saw a significant increase during this period, indicating strong local demand. This trend is particularly impressive considering the limited inventory available in the region. The resilience of the Northern Virginia market is evident in the numbers, as both buyers and sellers continue to engage actively.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs Add $2.1B In 8 Days—Last Time This Happened, Bitcoin Hit An All-Time High
data.description: U.S. Bitcoin ETFs have experienced a continuous influx of $2.1 billion over eight consecutive days until April 23. This marks the lengthiest streak since October 2025. The last run lasted nine days and led to Bitcoin hitting its all-time high of $126,000. According to ETF analyst Eric Balchunas, the momentum for ETFs is resurging as all tracked periods are currently positive after months. BlackRock's IBIT has attracted $3 billion in flows over a year, ranking it in the top 1% of all ETFs. On April 23 alone, $223.21 million flowed in, with IBIT accounting for $167.49 million. On the flip side, Fidelity's FBTC experienced a notable outflow of $16.93 million. Bitcoin's price has surged from $68,000 to $77,000 during this period, a 12% increase coinciding with the revival of ETF interest.

data.title: Meta to use millions of Amazon AI chips in a multi-year deal worth billions, according to AWS.
data.description: Meta, the parent company of Facebook, has recently entered into a multi-year agreement with Amazon to utilize Amazon's AI chips. This deal, estimated to be worth billions of dollars, was confirmed by AWS.

data.title: Richard Names Jenni McCarthy as Vice President of Business Development, Western U.S.
data.description: A national contractor focused on community-building, healthcare, and innovation – Richard Purpose Builders – made a significant announcement today. Jennifer McCarthy, also known as Jenni, has now become a part of the organization. This reflects the company's dedication to achieving its goals in these areas.

data.title: Zondacrypto's CEO disappears amid Poland probe on alleged fraud, with a reported whereabouts in Israel.
data.description: Authorities in Poland are currently probing Zondacrypto for suspected fraudulent activities and issues concerning access to funds. Reports from local media suggest that the company's CEO, Przemysław Kral, is currently located in Israel. The investigation involves significant financial figures and has sparked concerns within the cryptocurrency industry.

data.title: Lassonde Industries Inc. Will Hold a Conference Call To Discuss Its First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Rougeont, Quebec, on April 24, 2026, Lassonde Industries Inc. (TSX: LAS.A) shared plans to hold a conference call to review its financial performance in the first quarter of 2026 on May 8, 2026. The call will feature Mr. Vince Timpano, CEO, and Mr. Eric Gemme, CFO as hosts.

data.title: World Wide Technology Honored with Webby Award for 2026 Special Olympics USA Games ‘Champions’ App
data.description: In St. Louis, World Wide Technology (WWT), a leading global tech solutions provider, has received a prestigious Webby Award for designing the "Champions" mobile app for the 2026 Special Olympics USA Games. The award was in the Apps, Software & Immersive category for Best Practices, and WWT was honored as the People’s Voice winner. The Webby Awards, known as the “Internet’s highest honor” according to The New York Times, are presented by the International Academy of Digital Arts.

data.title: Amazon Stock Eyes Breakout On Meta AI Chip Deal
data.description: Amazon's cloud computing division will supply central processing units (CPUs) to assist Meta's artificial intelligence (AI) operations. This partnership has caught investors' attention as Amazon's stock is poised for a potential surge following the deal.
